name: Mgx Resources Limited
analysis: MGX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 28% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3550, stop A$0.3267, target A$0.4000 (1.59:1) — then trail it.
